text:
FAILED: Telegram/gen/Telegram_XdpBackground_gir.timestamp Telegram/gen/Telegram_XdpBackground.gir /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/Telegram_XdpBackground_gir.timestamp /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/Telegram_XdpBackground.gir 
cd /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram && env /usr/local/bin/g-ir-scanner --quiet -n XdpBackground --nsversion 1.0 -l /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/libTelegram_XdpBackground_dbus.a --c-include /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/dbus/Telegram_XdpBackground_dbus.h -i Gio-2.0 -o /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/Telegram_XdpBackground.gir /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/dbus/Telegram_XdpBackground_dbus.c /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/dbus/Telegram_XdpBackground_dbus.h && echo 1> /tmp/ports/usr/ports/net-im/telegram-desktop/work-qt5/.build/Telegram/gen/Telegram_XdpBackground_gir.timestamp
env: /usr/local/bin/g-ir-scanner: No such file or directory


# ls /usr/local/bin/g-ir-scanner
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root wheel  3.9K Jan 14 12:03:34 2024 /usr/local/bin/g-ir-scanner*
